diagram_name: The Knowledge Framework Applied to AOKs
chapter_title: Areas of Knowledge and Mathematical Methods
learning_objective: Compare the eight Areas of Knowledge using the four dimensions of the Knowledge Framework.
specification:
Type: diagram **sim-id:** knowledge-framework-aok
**Library:** p5.js
**Status:** Specified **Bloom Level:** Analyze (L4) **Bloom Verb:** Compare **Learning Objective:** Compare the eight Areas of Knowledge using the four dimensions of the Knowledge Framework. **Instructional Rationale:** An interactive matrix allows students to select any AOK and see how it scores on each dimension of the Knowledge Framework, making abstract comparisons concrete and explorable. **Visual elements:** - A grid with eight columns (one per AOK) and four rows (Scope, Concepts/Language, Methodology, Historical Development) - Each cell contains a brief summary that appears on hover or click - AOK icons or color-coded headers for each column - A highlight effect when comparing two AOKs side by side **Interactive controls:** - Click any AOK column header to see its full Knowledge Framework profile in a detail panel below the grid - A "Compare" mode: select two AOKs to see their profiles side by side with similarities highlighted in green and differences highlighted in amber - A dropdown to select which Knowledge Framework dimension to sort by **Default state:** All eight AOKs visible as column headers. Mathematics highlighted by default. **Color scheme:** Teal headers, cream cells, amber highlights for selected items, coral for comparison differences. **Responsive design:** Canvas resizes to fit container width. On narrow screens, switches to a single-AOK detail view with tabs. Implementation: p5.js with click detection and createSelect() for dimension sorting.
